abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Night Cap
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may discard a card to move up to 5" and then give one other model within 1" a Poison token.

abilities.name: Toad-Al Power
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may discard a Glowy or Poison token to increase the Rg of that action by +4".

actions.name: Ale-Drench Blast
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, models within (aura)1" of the target are dealt 1 damage. Models damaged by this action gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: Trap Door
triggers.text: Place the target within 4" of its current location.

triggers.name: Hypno Toad
triggers.text: The target declares a non-Charge tactical action, chosen and controlled by this model.

actions.name: Prestidigitation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target another friendly model. If the target is Hopscotch, increase the TN of generated Wp duels by +2.
actions.effects: Enemies within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain an Entranced token and be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Delicious Finish
triggers.text: Models that fail this duel gain a Poison token.

actions.name: I Need A Volunteer!
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other model only. Once per turn.
actions.effects: Move this model 8" toward the target. Then the target heals 2 and may remove up to one token.

triggers.name: Spiked Coffee
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to the target. Draw a card.
